meta.title: Transfer of Pseudomonas perfectomarina Baumann, Bowditch, Baumann, and Beaman 1983 to Pseudomonas stutzeri (Lehmann and Neumann 1896) Sijderius 1946
meta.section: Original Papers Relating to Systematic Bacteriology

abstractHtml: We propose the transfer of Pseudomonas perfectomarina to the species Pseudomonas stutzeri as strain ZoBell. The proposal is based on 60% deoxyribonucleic acid (DNA)-DNA homology with P. stutzeri ATCC 17588T, a similar guanine-plus-cytosine content, and the conformity of more than 100 nutritional and general characteristics.
